writing.title: Writing Task 1: Describe a record or ranking
writing.prompt: Write a short paragraph (about 40 words) describing a record/ranking (highest, biggest, best...), using superlative adjectives.
writing.sampleAnswer: Fansipan is the highest mountain in Vietnam. Ho Chi Minh City has the largest population in the country. This was the most difficult test of the year.
checklist: Dùng đúng the + adj-est hoặc the most + adj
Có ít nhất 2 ví dụ xếp hạng khác nhau
Câu văn rõ ràng, có dữ kiện cụ thể

writing.title: Writing Task 1: Describe similarities and differences
writing.prompt: Write a short paragraph (about 40 words) describing similarities and differences, using as...as and not as...as.
writing.sampleAnswer: My hometown isn't as crowded as the capital, but it's growing fast. It's quite similar to other small towns nearby. It is common for students here to work part-time.
checklist: Dùng as...as cho sự tương đương
Dùng not as...as cho sự khác biệt
Có ít nhất 1 ví dụ so sánh cụ thể
